schema.description: Music Player agent to play and control music. Use it to play, start, put on, queue, or listen to a specific song, artist, album, genre, or playlist (named or described by mood, e.g. 'chill music for studying'); control playback (pause, resume, skip/next, previous, shuffle, repeat, volume); choose the playback device; and browse, search, or manage playlists and favorites.
